body_plan.core_shape: elongated quadruped torso with shark-like head and tail fin

parts.shape: elongated shark-like snout with open hinged jaw
parts.placement: front of body, low to ground

parts.shape: small round white circle with black pupil
parts.placement: side of head, near snout base

parts.shape: short stubby dog-like legs with clawed paws

distinctive_features: shark-shaped head fused onto a four-legged dog body
large gaping jaw with many triangular teeth
tall dorsal fin plus a second striped spike fin behind it
shark tail fin at the rear instead of a dog tail
dark blotch marking on the haunch
single visible eye with white sclera
locomotion: walks on four stubby clawed legs like a land shark-dog, tail fin used for balance or swimming bursts
vibe: a shark that decided to grow legs and hunt on land like a dog
